XACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION

Contains XACT notification description information.

typedef struct _XACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION{
    WORD wType;
    WORD wFlags;
    union {
        PXACTSOUNDBANK pSoundBank;
        PXACTWAVEBANK pWaveBank;
    } u;
    DWORD dwSoundCueIndex;
    PXACTSOUNDCUE pSoundCue;
    PVOID pvContext;
    HANDLE hEvent;
} XACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION, *PXACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION;

typedef const XACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION *PCXACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION;

Members

wType
Notification type. An XACT_NOTIFICATION_TYPE value, or XACT_NOTIFICATION_TYPE_UNUSED (to retrieve or cancel any notification type when calling GetNotification or FlushNotification).
wFlags
Value indicating the notification flags. This defines the type of object the notification is registered for and can be the following:
Value Description
XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_PERSIST Indicates that the notification should persist after the event has occurred. This flag is used only when registering a notification. If this flag is not specified, notifications are automatically unregistered after they fire once. This flag is not valid when calling GetNotification or FlushNotification.
XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_SOUNDCUE_DESTROYED Notification references a sound cue that has been terminated and freed by XACT (commonly set for Stop notifications).
XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_WAVEBANK Notification applies to a wave bank. This flag cannot be used with the XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_PERSIST or XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_SOUNDCUE_INDEX flags. When specifying this flag, the wType member must be eXACTNotification_StreamDataAvailable. Also, when specifying this flag, the dwSoundCueIndex member must be XACT_SOUNDCUE_INDEX_UNUSED. A pointer to a valid wave bank must be specified when using this flag.
XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_SOUNDCUE_INDEX Notification applies to a sound cue index. This flag cannot be used with the XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_WAVEBANK flag. A pointer to a valid sound bank must be specified when using this flag.
XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_SOUNDCUE_INSTANCE Notification applies to a sound cue instance. This flag cannot be used with the XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_WAVEBANK flag. A pointer to a valid sound bank and a valid sound cue must be specified when using this flag.
pSoundBank
Pointer to an IXACTSoundBank.
pWaveBank
Pointer to an IXACTWaveBank.
dwSoundCueIndex
Value indicating the sound cue index. This value must be XACT_SOUNDCUE_INDEX_UNUSED when specifying the XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_WAVEBANK flag. If XACT_SOUNDCUE_INDEX_ALL is specified, notifications on all cues will be affected when calling GetNotification, FlushNotification, RegisterNotification, or UnRegisterNotification.
pSoundCue
Pointer to an IXACTSoundCue. This parameter is reserved when calling RegisterNotification and FlushNotification and should be set to NULL. For GetNotification, pSoundCue contains the instance pointer of a sound cue, if the notification was registered on a sound cue index. Titles can use the returned pSoundCue to identify which cue instance the notification applies to, but should not make any calls using the pSoundCue pointer if the XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_SOUNDCUE_DESTROYED flag is set on the notification (indicating that the cue has been freed).
pvContext
Ignored. Must be NULL.
hEvent
An event handle.

Remarks

Some members of the XACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION structure are used differently, depending on which XACT API notification function is called and whether the structure is an in parameter or an out parameter. The following functions take the XACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION structure as an in parameter:

Notification Function wType wFlags union dwSoundCueIndex pSoundCue hEvent
FlushNotification Required Required Required Required if wFlags contains XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_SOUNDCUE_INDEX, otherwise use XACT_SOUNDCUE_INDEX_UNUSED Reserved; pass NULL Ignored
GetNotification Required Required Required Required if wFlags contains XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_SOUNDCUE_INDEX, otherwise use XACT_SOUNDCUE_INDEX_UNUSED Reserved; pass NULL Ignored
RegisterNotification Required Required Required Required if wFlags contains XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_SOUNDCUE_INDEX, otherwise use XACT_SOUNDCUE_INDEX_UNUSED Reserved; pass NULL Optional handle of an event you wish to have set when the notification fires
UnRegisterNotification Required Required Required Required if wFlags contains XACT_FLAG_NOTIFICATION_USE_SOUNDCUE_INDEX, otherwise use XACT_SOUNDCUE_INDEX_UNUSED Reserved; pass NULL Ignored

Additionally, notification types can be valid or invalid with a particular object type. The table below illustrates which combinations can be used:

Notification SoundCue WaveBank
eXACTNotification_Start Valid Invalid
eXACTNotification_Stop Valid Invalid
eXACTNotification_Marker Valid Invalid
eXACTNotification_StreamDataAvailable Valid Valid

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xact.h.

See Also

IXACTSoundBank, IXACTEngine::FlushNotification, IXACTEngine::GetNotification, IXACTEngine::RegisterNotification, IXACTEngine::UnRegisterNotification, XACT_NOTIFICATION
